feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model
feed.subtitle: ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to filter a cds search help result based on a UI field?
entry.content:
@Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [

{ entity:{ element: 'Version',

name: 'ZPSBC_ITEMX_SH' } },

{ distinctValues: true, useForValidation: true },

{ additionalBinding: [{ localElement: 'Aadhar',

element: 'AadharID',

usage: #FILTER }] }

 

I am using the highlighted annotation in bold to filter the cds result.

I want the result of the cds to return values of version where aadhar value

matches not all unrelated values. but it is not working. Please help.

 

regards,

Prasenjit

entry.title: Modify existing custom Fiori App
entry.content:
There is an already existing custom Fiori app using RAP deployed in the system (S4HPCE). I have a requirement to modify the UI by adding custom action. Previous developer dont have a copy of the BAS project.

My question is how can I load the project into BAS so I can modify the app and deploy?

entry.title: Custom Hierarchy in ABAP CDS
entry.content:
Hi All,

I'm working on creation of Query CDS which is used in SAC/AFO for building dashboards. In this we want to Implement a Hierarchy in a particular field I have created a custom table where I have maintained the hierarch nodes accordingly.



I  want consume this hierarchy through the CDS to AFO/SAC.
I have tried using annotations in base cube like this ,


I defined the hierarchy in a cds with self association. and through annotations I imported the hierarchy on field called ZdimGrpaccnt.

Then I consumed this CDS in a Query CDS.



While consuming it in AFO the hierarchy is not enabled on the column.


Also I tried through define hierarchy Approach. It is also not working

 

While testing the hierarchy through the Class and table function, I'm getting the hierarchy as needed.

 

 


Can Somebody please suggest how to achieve hierachy in AFO/SAC in this scenerio.
please provide some detailed steps of what needs to be done.


Many Thanks in Advance,
Regards,
Arasu

entry.title: I am getting 'No data found ' error when ever i am trying to create the object in SAP RAP
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I am new to the RAP and I am using the Unmanaged scenario with Draft. When ever I tried to create the object I am getting the No data found error message even though the key field data is filled. Same scenario is working with out draft. Could anyone help me on this issue please. 

Thanks and Regards,

Prasanth.

entry.title: ABAP RAP managed scenario Default values
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have the following requirement in ABAP RAP managed scenario non-draft. I have to populate default values for few properties like currency code.

The trigger should be after clicking on the create button. like the PBO init event in classical ABAP.

I have tried to use the determination , but the code is triggerd too late, at the moment after the user clicks on the save button.

 

Thanks in advance

entry.title: RAP / Restful Application Programming Model: Root Create Method - How to generate lineItem facet?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

it is possible to generate multiple facets on the object page. Their corresponding fields will automatically be generated - able to be filled - when entering the create method.

Generally, when aiming to generate fields on the object page:
- UI.Facet (type: FIELDGROUP_REFERENCE) and the corresponding fields need to be annotated with UI.fieldgroup

If this is done, then the CRUD-Create-Method generated by the RAP Framework will also be able to utilize these fields, allowing the User to enter the given data.

But here is the problem: Can the same be done with lists / lineItems?
In order to generate lineItems on the object page, one would have to utilize a composition:
- In parent: UI.Facet (type: LINEITEM_REFERENCE), aswell as targetElement relating to the Composition (for example: _ChildData) and ideally targetQualifier (for example: 'X')
- In child: UI.lineItem for every relevant field including the corresponding qualifier ('X')

Doing so will generate the lineItems on the object page, but the lineItems will not be generated inside the CRUD-Create-Method by the RAP framework. Why is that? How can it be achieved?

Essentially the goal is to generate a facet for fieldGroup and multiple facets for lineItems, each of which possess their own CRUD-Create - all of this after entering the root-view CRUD-Create-Method. Can this be achieved?

Side-Note: unmanaged, no draft
The current state of the app is that only the locally annotated fieldGroup-fields appear inside the CRUD-Create-Method of the root view, but not the lineItems stemming from the compostion child. (I also noticed, that by defining the targetElement annotation inside a facet, that that facet will not generate inside the CRUD-Create-Method of the root view, but will still be generated inside the object page)

If possible, could it be that it can only be done on a specific OData Version (V2 / V4) / in specific RAP scenario (managed or unmanaged / draft or not draft)?

Thanks in advance for every answer!

Edit:
Architecture information:
- Projection_View 1: Possesses all facets (FieldGroup, LineItem) and also the fieldGroup-relevant fields (but no qualifier) - the lineItem Facet relates to the composition Child via targetElement and targetQualifier
- Projection_View 2: Possesses lineItem-relevant fields (appropiate qualifiers)
- Projection_View 2 redirected to parent Projection_View 1
- Projection_View 1 redirected to child Projection_View 2

entry.title: Fiori Elements + RAP: How to preserve order of batch action calls? Wrong Batch order.
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm working on a Fiori Elements app based on RAP (ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model).
The user scans equipment one by one and then triggers a Print Label action.
The labels should be printed in the exact order the equipment was scanned, but sometimes they are printed in the wrong order.

What I observed:

  • The action printLabel is defined in the behavior definition.

  • When multiple rows are selected and the action is triggered, the backend method is called multiple times — once for each entity.

  • Although the UI sends a $batch, the printLabel method is executed separately per entity, and not necessarily in order.

This results in labels being printed in the wrong sequence, which causes confusion and extra manual effort.

My Behavior definition:

managed implementation in class ZBP_I_Equipment
strict(2);

define behavior for Z_I_Equipment alias Equipment
persistent table I_Equipment
lock master
{
    field( readonly ) Equipment;
    action printLabel;
}

 

My questions:

  1. Is there a way to ensure that printLabel is called once with all selected entries, preserving their original selection order?

  2. Is it possible to change the behavior to support multiple processing (e.g. on entity ... multiple) in this RAP setup?

  3. Are there best practices for preserving processing order in such scenarios?

Any guidance or working examples would be greatly appreciated.
Thank you!

entry.title: Why my read in behavior implementation only called when edit
entry.content: i still confused with the logic of read in unmanaged behavior, why my read not called when i click go in list report and view the object page

entry.title: Additional binding with readonly fields is not working .
entry.content: I am using managed with draft scenario and When I am using additional binding and make the fields as a readonly the data of those fields are not saving in the database. When I make fields editable then the data is saving in the database. In my requirement I need to make the fields as a readonly. Can anyone help me on this issue please

entry.title: Can I implement @ObjectModel.query.implementedBy in view entity, not custom entity?
entry.content:
i have project to show list report and object page of purchase order. i use view entity and draft, i want to implement logic to fill the note and text of purchase order with query implement by, but i ecounter problem when do that

is that we can't do query implement in view entity? what alternative so i can get the note and text by read_text

entry.title: My First RAP Project. Many errors in Child and Parent projection view.
entry.content:
I am new to RAP. Try to create my first Project and getting many errors in Child and Parent projection view.

Help me find out what is wrong.

Thank you,

Gargi

entry.title: Need custom button to download an excel file in RAP application
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

In my RAP application I want to incorporate custom download action in list report page. So that when I click on that I need to download a custom excel sheet. 

Can we achieve this in RAP application, If yes, then how?

if not, what other options I can follow?

Thanks and Regards,

Prasanth.

entry.title: Simulate sales order using I_SalesOrderTP
entry.content:
I am trying to develop a Fiori app using RAP in SAP Public Cloud and one of the custom action is to do a simulation mode of creating a Sales Order.

Currently, I am using BO I_SalesOrderTP but I dont see an option or a parameter for a test run or simulate.

I tried using Rollback Entities but it doesnt allow in a behavior class.

I understand there are other API that support Sales Order Simulate but I would like to ask if there is a way using business objects.

entry.title: SAP Fiori ALP - Visual Filter does not work when many records
entry.content:
Hi Community!

I am having a problem with Fiori Analytical List Page (ALP).

I created a project to display some charts based on the data we have (Dumps), it starts working properly with a small amount of data, however when the data is more realistic it starts failing. For example: Less than 200 records. Everything is working fine!



More than 200 records: Visual Filters does not load any more and above 700 records approx the main chart does not load anymore.



I am learning about this technology, so I am not sure what the problem is

I was thinking in maybe limit these charts to the top N values

Visual Filter: Top 3-5 or Last 5 records.
Bar Chart: Top 20 records

But not sure if that will help me to solve it and also I don't know if is possible.

Thanks!

entry.title: RAP cl_csp_act_read_from_db has a bug
entry.content:
Hi 

cl_csp_act_read_from_db - execute 

Has statment  IF lines( lrt_loaded->* ) > lines( ct_unread_key ) in read keys. Should this not have be >= 

Dump if read table with one row in it 😞 

Br. 

Anna

entry.title: ABAP: Installation Guide
entry.content:
Dear SAP-Community,

Quite new to ABAP, however the whole installation process is a bit interesting.

Is there a quick guide to install everything a for it to be within the framework of it being a free trail ?

Some additional questions:

1. How to install SAP GUI

entry.title: Using ABAP RAP, show radio buttons in a popup
entry.content:
Hi,
I have a simple requirement to show a popup containing four radio buttons using ABAP RAP.

First Try
I tried to use abstract entity and was able to show the popup with Input & CheckBox but cannot find a suitable datatype that renders a Radio button.

If there exist a suitable data type that renders radio button, it would be one of the easiest solution.

SecondTry
I tried to use a custom CDS enumerated type in my abstract entity but discovered that it is not supported.
Yes, we do have other options of extending the Fiori element in BAS using UI5 or Flexible Programming model but I want to avoid that and find a solution within RAP itself.

entry.title: ABAP RAP Use of Custom Enity as Association
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have build a CDS entity ZC_MAIN_CDS with some fields , like DepartmentUserId.

That CDS has an association with custom CDS ZCE_USER_INFO like $projection.DepartmentUserId = _UserInfo.UserID.

The custom entity ZCE_USER_INFO is implemented with an ABAP class, and tested and works fine.

I have exposed the ZCE_USER_INFO in the behavior definition. I m not sure of this is needed.

The issue I have is to present fields of the Custom Entity  in my screen. For instance DepartmentUserId together with name comming from ZCE_USER_INFO. 

For other associations with CDS view entities, that works fine.

The call the Odata in the backend using ?$expand works correctly with populating fields of ZCE_USER_INFO.

Is there any solution for this issue? or any link for the solution?

Thank you

 

 

The issue was that used drop down . issue solved by using value help

entry.title: Eclipse ABAP ADT - New Cloud Project - No option for 'SAP BTP ABAP Environment'
entry.content:
I've installed latest Eclipse and ABAP ADT. I did the pre-reqs specified here https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/#abap

However when I go to create an ABAP Cloud project I don't see an option to choose 'SAP BTP ABAP Environment'.

I only see 'Specify the ABAP service instance for connecting to the cloud environment.' ABAP service Instance URL.

I've attached image of expected popup with BTP option as well as the screen I get where its missing. Also is my Eclipse and ADT version.

entry.title: ABAP RAP: Upload data from Excel file
entry.content:
Hi,

 

I was wondering if it is possible to upload the data from an Excel file  without saving the rawstring data in the database?  without any modification on the front-end.

In most tutorial what I have seen, the attachment content is saved in a database tabel.

Thanks in advane
